one_line_reason: Well-built and fast-growing, but an SEO/content/ad business (the team's weakness) in the most AI-Overview-exposed niche, with unproven week-old AdSense revenue, sold at the peak of a 3-month ramp.

build_scale_fit.note: Calculators are ~10 lines of Watt's-law JS; growth is 100% SEO/content — the team's weakness. Software skills add almost nothing.

pmf_retention.note: Real search demand but zero user loyalty; pure Google pass-through traffic.

unit_economics.note: AdSense ~1 week old = no real revenue history; display-only, international/low-CPC, informational = low RPM.

moat_channel.note: Single channel (Google organic), zero moat; commodity — Google's own answer box and rapidtables/inchcalculator rank.

growth_market.note: Growing now but the category is structurally disintermediated by AI Overviews / instant answers.

tech_ip.note: Simple and transferable, but trivially replicable; content provenance (AI-generated? 18 auto-translations?) unknown.

seller_risk.note: Brand-new site monetized last week, already for sale at the top of the ramp — classic build-to-flip; adverse selection.

key_unknowns: Actual AdSense revenue and RPM since approval (only days old) — swings unit economics; near-zero would confirm 'not a business yet'.
Asking price and its basis — needed for deal quality, but does not change the PASS given the competence gate.
Query/page mix and AI Overview presence on top terms — how much of the 459k impressions is being disintermediated; worst case confirms fragility.
Content provenance and IP ownership (AI-generated? auto-translated?), and any prior Google penalties.
Traffic composition: 100% Google organic vs any branded/direct.
seller_questions: Screen-share the AdSense dashboard: actual daily earnings and page RPM since approval. (unit economics; also: why sell one week after monetizing?)
Why sell now, one week after monetizing? How many sites have you built and sold? (adverse selection)
Search Console by query and by page: share of clicks from the 'watts to volts' head term vs the blog; do top queries show an AI Overview? Trend through the last core update? (fragility)
Asking price and its basis — a multiple of what profit? (deal quality)
Is the content and are the 18 language versions AI-generated? Who owns the IP? Any manual penalties? What % of traffic is branded/direct vs Google organic? (IP + fragility)
What transfers — domain, GA/GSC, social handles, email? Note AdSense does not transfer; the new owner re-applies, so plan a day-one monetization gap. (transferability)
inputs_provided: URL wattstovolts.com [VERIFIED — site fetched: electrical conversion calculators + blog, display/AdSense]
AdSense approved 5-10 days ago [ASSUMED — user-stated, unverified]
GSC 3 months: 459k impressions, 2.97k clicks, CTR 0.6%, avg position 8.7 [seller-provided screenshot, UNVERIFIED]
GSC 28 days: 264k impressions, 1.75k clicks, CTR 0.7%, position 8.2 [seller-provided]
GSC 7 days: 82k impressions, 528 clicks, CTR 0.6%, position 8.1 [seller-provided]

sources.title: Forbes — Google AI Overviews are eating your traffic (2026)
